mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "u.id", a.info AS "info", a.isdu AS "isdu", a.nid AS "nid", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
u.idno AS "u.idno", u.nickname AS "u.nickname"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_member_notice( id, uid, info, isdu, nid, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{info}, #{isdu}, #{nid}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_member_notice SET uid = #{u.id}, info = #{info}, isdu = #{isdu}, nid = #{nid}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
